Prized by pack rats far and wide, Bags of Holding originated among the mischievous kender in the far-off world of Krynn. According to popular folklore, one enterprising kender actually founded a utopian village inside his Bag of Holding. It apparently continues to thrive to this very day.

Platemail is composed of metal plates held together by sections of chainmail.  Dwarven made platemail offers superb protection while being lighter and quiter.  Large races will find it impossible to fit inside of this armor.

Platemail is composed of metal plates held together by sections of chainmail.  Dwarven made platemail offers superb protection while being lighter and quiter.  Large races will find it impossible to fit inside of this armor.

Platemail is composed of metal plates held together by sections of chainmail.  Dwarven made platemail offers superb protection while being lighter and quiter.  Large races will find it impossible to fit inside of this armor.

A chain shirt offers excellent defense versus slashing weapons but is practically useless in combat against blunt weapons.  It weighs considerably less than a full suit of chainmail and although it offers great mobility it is not completely silent.

A chain shirt offers excellent defense versus slashing weapons but is practically useless in combat against blunt weapons.  It weighs considerably less than a full suit of chainmail and although it offers great mobility it is not completely silent.

Ringmail is essentially the same as chainmail armor, larger links and a looser mesh make it lighter than chainmail with similar protection.  Ringmail however can be more easily pierced by missile weapons and long thin blades.  This suit created by dwarven smiths and is of exceptional quality.

Ringmail is essentially the same as chainmail armor, larger links and a looser mesh make it lighter than chainmail with similar protection.  Ringmail however can be more easily pierced by missile weapons and long thin blades.  This suit created by dwarven smiths and is of exceptional quality.

Scalemail is made by overlapping small, scale shaped pieces of metal much like a snake's skin.  It protects well against slashing and blunt weapons, but piercing weapons are able to slip between the scales easily.  It is heavy in comparison to it's protection and the scales scrape together while moving.
Being made from adamantite this shield offers better protection than it's normal cousins.
Naked before the Great Father of the Plains/ Naked but not defensless.
Master's Robe of the Stone Hand

Like many evil items, these robes are fashioned in great numbers by the Zhentarim and their minions. They are found far and wide across the Realms, and the more hands they touch, the more influence the Zhents enjoy.

This upgraded version of the Club of Detonation not only helps it's weilder hit it's mark more often. 

But also Has a more intensified Impact Fire Damage.

This is the Upgraded form of the Rune Hammer +4.

This is a Relic level Item and is extremely rare.
This mace is prefered by Clerics that aren't as strong and able in Melee Combat. Granting the Weilder increased strength to help in melee combat and wear heavier armor.
Crossbow of the Dead Eye Dwarf

Staffs of Power are immediately familiar to most spellcasters, and are almost icons of arcane study. The inherent utility of such staffs has resulted in many being crafted or commissioned, and specific histories are usually lost in the crowd.
